name: Shoko
short_description: Capture and battle hundreds of different monsters to complete your bestiary. Shoko is a game with waves of enemies to defeat and Roguelite elements in a cute, colorful, hand-drawn universe.
detailed_description:
Capture hundreds of monsters!


Shoko is a game with waves of enemies to defeat and Roguelite elements in a cute, colorful, and hand-drawn universe.

Embark on the adventure with a net and venture through different areas to discover over 100 different monsters. The tons of available upgrades will allow you to defeat the game's bosses and complete your bestiary.

Each captured monster will grant a unique effect to the player, enabling them to create unique and powerful combinations.

Features:


  • 50 different monsters!
  • 50 upgrades!
  • 5 Bosses to defeat!
  • 5 zones with unique environments!
  • 5 different types of monsters!
  • Switch from manual to automatic mode mid-game!
